Name: Indicator icon
Description: The icon indicate this is an alert

Name: Description
Description: Describe what’s happening and what the user needs to know
Content Rules:
1. Alert banner messaging should be clear and efficient
2. Use either a short phrase or phrases that describes what’s happening and what the user needs to know
3. When possible, provide an action the user can take to remedy the situation.
4. Do not include periods for short phrases or single sentences

Name: Link
Description: A action or a source link

Name: Close button
Description: This button allows the user to close the banner alert
Dynamic Behaviour: Clicking on the cross button can close the the banner alert

Name: Container
Dynamic Behaviour:
1. Red color means error
2. Yellow color means warning
3. Blue color means information
4. Green color means success
